selection_rule: AI can choose target markets dynamically, but the default starting focus is Africa industrial automation and system integration.

target_markets.why: Industrial center in Africa, strong PLC/SCADA/DCS demand, English-friendly communication.
Large market with growing industrial automation and IIoT demand.
East Africa industrial and infrastructure hub with monitoring and SmartGrid opportunities.
Relevant because of existing SmartGrid relationships and easier regional referencing.

screening_rules: Prefer rating 4.0 and above, especially 4.8 to 5.0.
Prefer leads with public phone numbers because they can feed the WhatsApp workflow.
Keep companies related to industrial automation, system integration, PLC, SCADA, IIoT, monitoring, energy, BMS, or industrial control.
Exclude pure retail, unrelated trading, or low-relevance businesses.
